LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_FMJ.label: 12.5x100 Justice (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_FMJ.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles, primarily the MG206 and APW1.
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_AP.label: 12.5x100 Justice (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_AP.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles, primarily the MG206 and APW1.
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_Incendiary.label: 12.5x100 Justice (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_Incendiary.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles, primarily the MG206 and APW1.
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_HE.label: 12.5x100 Justice (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_HE.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles, primarily the MG206 and APW1.
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_Sabot.label: 12.5x100 Justice (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_125x100_Sabot.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles, primarily the MG206 and APW1.
LanguageData.Bullet_125x100_FMJ.label: 12.5x100 Justice bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_125x100_AP.label: 12.5x100 Justice bullet (AP)
